_comment: HAND-AUTHORED answer key for the nist_ctc_03 drawing-read eval. Derived ONLY from the callouts DRAWN on tasks/nist_ctc_03/drawing.png (NIST PMI Test Model 3, single isometric sheet), read by tile-cropping a 500-DPI render into 4 overlapping quadrants and transcribing each toleranced callout by eye. NOT derived from anything under ground_truth/, the .stp, meta.json or topology.json. Values are AS DRAWN in DECIMAL INCHES (units=in), pre-normalization: a downstream normalize_to_mm scales x25.4. Each diameter is recorded ONCE, on its feature (not duplicated in dimensions[]), so the recall pool is not inflated. GD&T is dense on this MBE part; every frame transcribed with its datum refs and material condition as drawn. Auditable: re-render at 500 DPI, tile-crop, and the same callouts reappear at the cited provenance.

dimensions.provenance: TL quadrant, left of the two upper slots, shown as (.750) reference/basic

features.provenance: TL quadrant, top, '2X Ø.438 +/-.005' on the upper tab/flange
TL/TR quadrants, right side, 'Ø2.00 +/-.01' large circular hole
TL/BL quadrants, left-center, '4X Ø.525 +/-.005 SWITCH MOUNTING LOCATIONS'
BL quadrant, central flange, 'Ø1.085 +/-.003', datum F (MCS at hole center)
TR/BR quadrants, right side, 'Ø.438 +/-.005' (two instances on the side flange)

gdt_frames.provenance: TL quadrant, near 2X Ø.438, frame reads pos Ø.05(M) | A | B(M) | C(M)
TL/TR quadrants, near Ø2.00, frame reads pos Ø.06 | D | B | C
TL/BL quadrants, near 4X Ø.525, frame reads pos Ø.05(M) | D | B | C
BL quadrant, near Ø1.085, frame reads pos .01 | E
BL/BR quadrants, near Ø1.500, frames pos Ø.02 | D | B | C and pos .03 | D | B | C
TR/BR quadrants, near side Ø.438, frame reads pos Ø.02 | A | B (datum C present)
BR quadrant, right edge, frame reads perp .01 | A (datum B)
TR/BR quadrants, right side, '2 COPLANAR SURFACES' profile .07 | A
